detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Millionaire.swapForTokenomics(uint256) (Millionaire.sol#693-705):
	External calls:
	- swapAndLiquify(liqTokens) (Millionaire.sol#695)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#801-815)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#781-793)
	- swapTokensForETHmkt(mktTokens) (Millionaire.sol#697)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amount,0,path,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#723-735)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapAndLiquify(liqTokens) (Millionaire.sol#695)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#801-815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- liqTokens = 0 (Millionaire.sol#703)
	Millionaire.liqTokens (Millionaire.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Millionaire._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Millionaire.sol#549-691)
	- Millionaire.currentLiqTokens() (Millionaire.sol#409-413)
	- Millionaire.swapForTokenomics(uint256) (Millionaire.sol#693-705)
	- mktTokens = 0 (Millionaire.sol#701)
	Millionaire.mktTokens (Millionaire.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Millionaire._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Millionaire.sol#549-691)
	- Millionaire.currentmktTokens() (Millionaire.sol#403-407)
	- Millionaire.swapForTokenomics(uint256) (Millionaire.sol#693-705)

detectors.description:

	External calls:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Millionaire.sol#495)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#801-815)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#781-793)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amount,0,path,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#723-735)

	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Millionaire.sol#495)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (Millionaire.sol#801-815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()] - amount) (Millionaire.sol#497)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (Millionaire.sol#825)
